top_videos.text:
We’re out here at Compass Point Coffee in Millvale from 10–2 📚☕️
It may be cloudy, but that just makes it the perfect day to grab a coffee and a new book to cozy up with for the rest of your Sunday ✨

#pittsburghbooks #indiebookstore #book
top_videos.author: the.ravens.quill

top_videos.text: Compass Point Coffee in Millvale, PA is a great option for house made syrups and roasted beans! They’ve got friendly staff and great drinks! I will say the more I sipped this latte, it didn’t taste so burnt! I’d totally come back!! I got an
top_videos.author: mcmonaglle
